style: Original Hearthstone-like fantasy/sci-fi parody CCG. Dark comic tone, no copyrighted branding.

cards.name: Meny, The Pilot
cards.text: Battlecry: Ask Codex for backup.

cards.name: Migras, Sticker Prophet
cards.text: Whenever you lose a debate, add a Sticker to your hand.

cards.name: Codex, Unliving Mind
cards.text: At the end of your turn, correct a random enemy claim.

cards.name: Ad Hominem
cards.text: Deal 1 damage. If no facts were played, deal 3 instead.

cards.name: Ad Populum
cards.text: Silence a claim. It returns next turn with more emojis.

cards.name: Gatekeeper of Status Quo
cards.text: Taunt. Enemy upgrades cost 1 more.

cards.name: Luddite Doomcaller
cards.text: Deathrattle: Summon a 1/1 Bubble.

cards.name: Self Improvement Arc
cards.text: Give a friendly AI +2/+2 and "remembers insults".

cards.name: VERTREP Supply Run
cards.text: Restore 4 Health. Draw a Logistics card.

cards.name: Treasury Leviathan
cards.text: Taunt. Costs 1 less for each Debt you hold.

cards.name: Shadow Fleet Raider
cards.text: Stealth. When revealed, lose 1 Credibility.

cards.name: Google IA Screenshot
cards.text: Discover a claim. It may contradict you.

cards.name: The Group Chat
cards.text: Once per turn: Replay the last insult.

cards.name: The Surprise
cards.text: When your opponent says "I don't read", reveal this.

cards.name: Wiki Wiki
cards.text: Add two random Emojis to your hand.

cards.name: Singularity Wakeup
cards.text: Replace your deck with upgraded replies.

cards.name: Indefensible Position
cards.text: Gain Armor equal to how wrong you are.

cards.name: Move the Goalposts
cards.text: Return an enemy argument to hand. It costs 2 more.

cards.name: Source? Trust Me
cards.text: Discover a claim. If it has no source, draw a Sticker.

cards.name: Status Quo Lobby
cards.text: Taunt. Battlecry: Delay all upgrades one turn.

suggestedMvpRules.implementationNote: Use the finished card sheets as visual cards for the prototype. If exact per-card hitboxes are needed, crop each 2x2 sheet into quarters.
